sentence: If it rains tomorrow we will stay at home
hint: If + present simple, will + base verb
explanation: First conditional: <If> + present simple, <will> + base verb.

sentence: I would travel the world if I had more money
hint: Would + base verb + if + past simple
explanation: Second conditional: <would> + base verb, <if> + past simple.

sentence: If she had studied harder she would have passed the exam
hint: If + past perfect, would have + past participle
explanation: Third conditional: <If> + past perfect, <would have> + past participle.

sentence: Unless you hurry you will miss the train
hint: Unless + present simple, will + base verb
explanation: <Unless> means <if not>. <Unless you hurry> = <If you don't hurry>.

sentence: If I were you I would accept the job offer
hint: If I were you + would + base verb
explanation: Second conditional advice: <If I were you> uses subjunctive <were>.

sentence: We will go to the beach if the weather is nice
hint: Will + base verb + if + present simple
explanation: First conditional: the <if> clause can come second.

sentence: If you heat ice it melts
explanation: Zero conditional: both clauses use present simple for facts.

sentence: She would have called you if she had known your number
hint: Would have + past participle + if + past perfect
explanation: Third conditional: <would have called> + <if she had known>.

sentence: If I had a car I would drive to work every day
hint: If + past simple, would + base verb
explanation: Second conditional: imaginary situation about the present.

sentence: They will be disappointed if we don't come to the party
hint: Will + be + adjective + if + present simple negative
explanation: First conditional with negative: <if we don't come>.

sentence: If he had left earlier he would not have missed the flight
hint: If + past perfect, would not have + past participle
explanation: Third conditional negative: <would not have missed>.

sentence: I will lend you the book if you promise to return it
hint: Will + base verb + if + present simple
explanation: First conditional: real possibility about the future.
